---
title: "Exam — <Course Title>"
subtitle: "<Term>"
date: YYYY-MM-DD
exam-duration: "120 minutes"
total-points: 100
authors:
  - name: "Prof. Dr. Andre Guettler"
    affiliation: "Institute of Strategic Management and Finance, Ulm University"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
  pdf:
    documentclass: scrartcl
    geometry: margin=2.5cm
solutions: false
---

::: {.content-hidden when-meta="solutions"}
> **Instructions.** Answer **all** questions. Show all work for full credit. You may use a non-programmable calculator. Total time: 120 minutes. Total points: 100.
:::

::: {.content-visible when-meta="solutions"}
> **INSTRUCTOR COPY — solutions visible.** Do not distribute.
:::

---

## Question 1  *(N points)* — <Topic>

State the question.

::: {.content-visible when-meta="solutions"}
**Solution.** …

**Marking scheme.**

- (a) ½ point per correct step.
- (b) Full credit only if final numerical answer matches within 0.01.
:::

## Question 2  *(N points)* — <Topic>

(a) Sub-part.

(b) Sub-part.

(c) Sub-part.

::: {.content-visible when-meta="solutions"}
**Solution.**

(a) …

(b) …

(c) …
:::

## Question 3  *(N points)* — <Topic>

State the question.

::: {.content-visible when-meta="solutions"}
**Solution.** …
:::

## Question 4  *(N points)* — <Topic>

State the question.

::: {.content-visible when-meta="solutions"}
**Solution.** …
:::

---

::: {.content-hidden when-meta="solutions"}
> *End of exam. Please verify that your name and matriculation number are on every page.*
:::

::: {.content-visible when-meta="solutions"}
**Total points distribution:** verify that points sum to 100 before printing the student copy.
:::
